assignments.description: Stamps $Record.Name onto the Name field of the current Loop_PRG_Records iteration. Loops back to Loop_PRG_Records for the next item; when exhausted, noMoreValuesConnector routes to Update_PRG_Records for a single bulk DML.
assignments.name: Assign_PRG_Name
assignments.label: Assign PRG Name

decisions.description: Guards the loop and DML. Evaluates var_PRGRecords populated by Get_PRG_Records. Yes (not null) → Loop_PRG_Records to stamp names and bulk update. No (null/empty) → flow terminates with no DML, which is correct when a household has no PRG records yet.
decisions.name: Has_PRG_Records
decisions.label: Has PRG Records?

Flow.description: After Save trigger on Account (update only). When a Household Account's Name changes (ISCHANGED(Name) AND Is_Household__c = true), mirrors the new Name onto all related PartyRelationshipGroup records where AccountId = $Record.Id. Retrieves all PRGs in one query, loops to stamp names, then performs a single bulk update. Uses a Has_PRG_Records guard to skip DML when no PRGs exist.
Flow.interviewLabel: SMQS Household Setup Name Sync Account to PRG {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: SMQS Household Setup Name Sync Account to PRG

loops.description: Iterates var_PRGRecords (all PRGs for this household Account). For each record, Assign_PRG_Name stamps $Record.Name onto Loop_PRG_Records.Name. When exhausted, noMoreValuesConnector routes to Update_PRG_Records for a single bulk DML.
loops.name: Loop_PRG_Records
loops.label: Loop PRG Records

recordLookups.description: Retrieves all PartyRelationshipGroup records where AccountId = $Record.Id. Returns null collection (assignNullValuesIfNoRecordsFound = true) when no PRGs exist, which causes Has_PRG_Records to skip the loop and DML. Connector routes to Has_PRG_Records. Result stored in var_PRGRecords.
recordLookups.name: Get_PRG_Records
recordLookups.label: Get PRG Records

recordUpdates.description: Bulk DML update for all PRG records in var_PRGRecords after Loop_PRG_Records stamps each Name. Single DML regardless of how many PRGs exist. Terminal — no successor element.
recordUpdates.name: Update_PRG_Records
recordUpdates.label: Update PRG Records

variables.description: All PartyRelationshipGroup records where AccountId = $Record.Id. Populated by Get_PRG_Records. Iterated and name-stamped by Loop_PRG_Records, then bulk-updated by Update_PRG_Records.
variables.name: var_PRGRecords
